  "text": "The pod security context field validation in kubernetes/kubernetes v1.32.0 is spread across two main layers:\n\n**1. API-level validation** (`pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go`):\n- `ValidateSecurityContext`: validates container-level SecurityContext, including the `privileged` field (checked against `capabilities.Get().AllowPrivileged`) and all other security context fields.\n- `validatePodSpecSecurityContext`: validates pod-level PodSecurityContext fields including `runAsNonRoot` and `seccompProfile`.\n- `validateSeccompProfileField`, `ValidateSeccompProfile`, `validateSeccompProfileType`: validate seccomp profile values at the API level.\n\n**2. Pod Security Admission (PSA) policy checks** (`staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/`):\n- `check_runAsNonRoot.go`: `CheckRunAsNonRoot()` and `runAsNonRoot_1_0()` enforce `runAsNonRoot=true` as a restricted-level policy check.\n- `check_privileged.go`: `CheckPrivileged()` and `privileged_1_0()` forbid `privileged=true` as a baseline-level check.\n- `check_capabilities_baseline.go`: `CheckCapabilitiesBaseline()` and `capabilitiesBaseline_1_0()` restrict which capabilities may be added (baseline level).\n- `check_capabilities_restricted.go`: `CheckCapabilitiesRestricted()`, `capabilitiesRestricted_1_22()`, `capabilitiesRestricted_1_25()` require dropping ALL capabilities (restricted level).\n- `check_seccompProfile_baseline.go`: `seccompProfileBaseline_1_0()` and `seccompProfileBaseline_1_19()` enforce baseline seccomp profile constraints.\n- `check_seccompProfile_restricted.go`: `CheckSeccompProfileRestricted()`, `seccompProfileRestricted_1_19()`, `seccompProfileRestricted_1_25()` enforce restricted seccomp profile (RuntimeDefault or Localhost) requirements.\n\n**3. Kubelet runtime enforcement** (`pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/`):\n- `security_context_others.go`: `verifyRunAsNonRoot()` enforces the runAsNonRoot constraint at container start time on Linux/non-Windows.\n- `security_context_windows.go`: `verifyRunAsNonRoot()` enforces the runAsNonRoot constraint on Windows containers.\n- `kuberuntime_container.go`: calls `verifyRunAsNonRoot()` during container config generation.\n- `security_context.go`: synthesizes the effective security context (including seccompProfile) applied to containers at runtime."
}
